issues.title: Enemy dealt 13 damage (81% of 16 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 165, floor 3 encounter 1, enemy dealt 13 damage when player had 16 HP. This is 81% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 13 damage (81% of player's 16 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 3 with 69.67213114754098% accuracy. Final encounter against crystal_golem (common), dealt 58 but took 65 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 70% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (122 cards played, 69.7% accuracy). All 8 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 69.7% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5

issues.title: Difficulty spike: F3E1 took 11 turns (prev floor avg: 5.3)
issues.description: Encounter at floor 3 encounter 1 (crystal_golem, common) took 11 turns to resolve, which is 2.1x the previous floor's average of 5.3 turns. This indicates a sudden difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth out enemy stat scaling between floors to avoid jarring difficulty jumps
